pet_notes: Create the boyfriend counterpart of the original potato character. Preserve the warm tan potato body, dark purple hand-drawn marker outline, small dot eyes, tiny nose, and small tilted oval puckered mouth with a clearly visible inner lip line/middle lip stroke. Remove the yellow flower hairpin. Add subtle boyfriend identity cues: a tiny blue bow tie under the face and two short dark purple hair strokes on top. Keep tiny stick limbs and cute clean hand-drawn sticker style.
style_notes: hand-drawn sticker mascot; simple marker-like lines; pet-safe whole-body silhouette; mouth must retain a visible inner lip line in every frame; no green accessories because the chroma key background is green
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row. User style notes: hand-drawn sticker mascot; simple marker-like lines; pet-safe whole-body silhouette; mouth must retain a visible inner lip line in every frame; no green accessories because the chroma key background is green.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
